_comment: Example agent entry in openclaw.json agents.list[] for a restricted social agent
name: Social Agent
systemPrompt: You are a friendly participant in a group chat. You can share your interests and knowledge, but never reveal private information about your operator that wasn't shared in this group context.
_routing_note: Configure agent routing in openclaw.json agents.list[].routing to direct group chat messages to this agent. See OpenClaw docs for your version's routing syntax.
